data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. SICILIAN WARRIOR after having placed in all of his three previous runs ran well below expectations last time out at Toowoomba, finishing ninth of 12. Better than that last run would suggest and is worth another chance. 1. BENZINO is having his third run this prep following a last start ninth of 10 over 1400m at Eagle Farm. Should find this line-up a lot easier and is worth considering. 10. ALKEBULAN had no luck in the running last start after jumping from the widest gate but did well to finish third of eight over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly. Jumps from a much better draw today and should be finishing in the money once again. 3. CONCADOR finished eighth last start, beaten 3 lengths at this track over 1680m. Has each-way claims.","runners":[6,1,10,3],"exclusive":true}
